chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-938 of 2024. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A No.4620/24. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For hearing of main case. 02.09.2025. Mr. Mushtaque Ali Tagar, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G Sindh a/w Sajid Iqbal Accounts Officer HMC. Accounts Officer Hyderabad Municipal Corporation (HMC) is present and filed statement admitting amounts due against department in shape of Gratuity & monthly Pension total Rs.1,805,357/-, such statement is taken on record and copy thereof is also supplied to the Counsel for Petitioner. He further submits that the dues will be paid to the Petitioner in the next month i.e. October, 2025 positively. Counsel for Petitioner submits that he would be satisfied if the department i.e. HMC would pay the dues in next month to the Petitioner. In view of above circumstances, the Petition in hand is hereby disposed of with directions to Respondents / HMC to pay the outstanding dues to the Petitioner in the first week of October, 2025. Let, the copy of this order be communicated with all concerned quarters. JUDGE JUDGE Ali.
